name: Black & White Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil or Vegetable oil
15 oz Great Northern Beans, rinsed and drained
15 oz Black Beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until crisp-tender in a medium skillet. Remove from heat and cool until warm.
2. Stir in vinegar, red pepper, parsley, garlic, NutraSweet (TM), salt, and pepper.
3. In a serving bowl, combine the beans (both types) and pour the onion mixture over them.
4. Mix well and serve.
Makes 8 servings
Nutritional Information Serving size 1/8 recipe
Diabetic food exchange 1 starch, 1 vegetable, 1/2 fat
